summary: Iteration 43: Testing TemaDom v6.5 theme toggle and v6.8 Professions page bug fix. All features pass: Backend returns free_slots.total=56, theme toggle works, localStorage persistence works, Professions page text is readable in LIGHT mode.
passed_tests: === BACKEND TESTS ===
✅ GET /api/stats/live returns free_slots.total = 56 (changed from 50)
✅ API response includes: clients, companies, masters, projects, free_slots, online
=== THEME TOGGLE TESTS (v6.5) ===
✅ Theme toggle button exists with data-testid='theme-toggle'
✅ Toggle shows ☀️ emoji in dark mode, 🌙 emoji in light mode
✅ Clicking toggle adds/removes 'light-mode' class on html element
✅ Theme persists in localStorage as 'temadom-theme' key
✅ Theme persists after page reload
=== LANDING PAGE TESTS ===
✅ Landing page renders in DARK mode - dark blue background (#0F172A)
✅ Landing page renders in LIGHT mode - light background (#F8FAFC)
✅ Hero counter displays '12 / 56' correctly
✅ Hero text shows 'ПЪРВИ 56 ФИРМИ = 1 ГОДИНА ПРЕМИУМ 0 EUR'
✅ Live counter widget shows '44 FREE 12/56'
✅ CTA section shows '56 фирми' prominently
✅ Style tiles section renders in both themes
✅ Pricing cards render in both themes
=== NAVBAR TESTS ===
✅ Navbar adapts background in dark mode (dark)
✅ Navbar adapts background in light mode (white)
✅ Theme toggle visible in navbar
✅ Navigation links readable in both themes
=== FOOTER TESTS ===
✅ Footer adapts background in dark mode
✅ Footer adapts background in light mode
✅ Footer text readable in both themes
=== PROFESSIONS PAGE (v6.8 BUG FIX) ===
✅ Professions page loads with data-testid='professions-page'
✅ Page title color in light mode: rgb(15, 23, 42) - dark, readable
✅ Card title color in light mode: rgb(15, 23, 42) - dark, readable
✅ Body background in light mode: rgb(248, 250, 252) - light
✅ Expanded profession card content readable in LIGHT mode
✅ 'How it should be done' steps readable in light mode
✅ 'Red flags' warnings readable in light mode
✅ Search input visible and functional
✅ Category filter buttons visible
=== LOGIN PAGE TESTS ===
✅ Login page renders in LIGHT mode with readable text
✅ Form elements (email, password, submit) visible
✅ Theme toggle works on login page
=== REGISTER PAGE TESTS ===
✅ Register page renders in DARK mode
✅ Register page renders in LIGHT mode
✅ Form elements (name, email, city, password) visible
✅ User type tabs (Клиент, Фирма/Майстор, Дизайнер) visible
critical_code_review_comments: Theme implementation uses CSS custom variables correctly:
56 slot limit correctly updated in backend server.py line 1231:
- Frontend displays this value correctly in hero, live counter, CTA
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 43 tested theme toggle (v6.5) and Professions page bug fix (v6.8). Key test IDs: theme-toggle, landing-page, professions-page, hero-counter, live-counter, cta-register. Theme stored in localStorage key 'temadom-theme'. CSS variables defined in index.css with .light-mode selector.
